title: blechnum capense subsp. laevigatum
intro: Blechnum capense subsp. laevigatum, also known as the smooth chain fern, is a subspecies of the Blechnum capense plant, a type of fern native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the smooth chain fern can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
